data.title: Ambitious developers are biggest risk to Bitcoin, says Michael Saylor
data.description:
Michael Saylor has said that the greatest risk to Bitcoin is ambitious opportunists advocating protocol changes.
source: https://protos.com/ambitious-developers-are-biggest-risk-to-bitcoin-says-michael-saylor/

data.title: Estate Planning Crucial for Cryptocurrency Holders to Secure Wealth
data.description: Millions in cryptocurrency wealth are at risk of vanishing when holders pass away, primarily due to inadequate estate planning. According to NS3.AI, experts caution that delays, misplaced private keys, and fiduciaries lacking knowledge of digital assets exacerbate this problem. It is vital for cryptocurrency holders to provide clear access and instructions to heirs to safeguard inherited digital assets.

data.title: Significant Transfer of SKY Tokens to Galaxy Digital
data.description: A substantial transfer of SKY tokens has been reported. According to ChainCatcher, at 02:50, a total of 35,245,600 SKY tokens were moved from an anonymous address, beginning with 0x12C4, to Galaxy Digital.

data.title: U.S. Marshals Investigate Alleged $40 Million Cryptocurrency Embezzlement
data.description: The U.S. Marshals Service is investigating a suspected embezzlement of over $40 million in cryptocurrency from a government-controlled wallet. According to NS3.AI, the alleged theft involves the son of an employee working for a federal contractor tasked with managing seized crypto assets. Details on how the individual accessed the wallet or whether the contractor's leadership was aware of the situation remain unclear.

data.title: Upbit Places Solar (SXP) on Trading Watchlist Amid Concerns

data.title: Oracle data center to bring 1,500 jobs to New Mexico
data.description:
Oracle says a big artificial intelligence data center going up in New Mexico will create twice as many permanent jobs as the company first thought, 1,500 positions once construction wraps up. The company put out the revised numbers Friday. Executive Pradeep Vincent wrote on LinkedIn that the project “will deliver high-quality jobs, sustainable infrastructure, and […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/oracle-data-center-to-bring-1500-jobs-to-new-mexico/

data.title: Sol Meme's coin CUM surged over 110 times in a single day, briefly pushing its market capitalization above $5 million.
data.description: According to GMGN data, the Solana blockchain's Meme coin CUM saw a daily increase of over 110 times, briefly pushing its market capitalization above $5 million. It is currently trading at approximately $5.5 million, indicating significant price volatility. Odaily reminds users that Meme coin prices are highly volatile, and investors should be aware of the risks.

data.title: Ethereum Price Movements Could Trigger Significant Liquidations
data.description: Ethereum's price fluctuations may lead to substantial liquidation events on major centralized exchanges. According to ChainCatcher, data from Coinglass indicates that if Ethereum's price falls below $2,778, the liquidation intensity for long positions could reach $1.788 billion. Conversely, if Ethereum surpasses $3,069, the liquidation intensity for short positions could amount to $1.132 billion.

data.description:

data.title: Ethereum Whales Accumulate Near Cost Basis as On-Chain Support Holds
data.description:
On-chain data shared by CryptoQuant shows a notable alignment between Ethereum’s current market price and the realized cost basis of long-term accumulation addresses, a dynamic that historically has marked structurally important price zones.
source: https://www.ethnews.com/ethereum-whales-accumulate-near-cost-basis-as-on-chain-support-holds/

data.title: Samsung's HBM4 Memory Chip Nears Nvidia Certification, Eyes 2026 Production
data.description: Samsung is on the verge of receiving final certification from Nvidia for its HBM4 memory chip, with plans to commence mass production by early 2026. According to NS3.AI, this development is set to enhance Samsung's standing in the high-bandwidth memory market. The move poses a competitive challenge to Micron, whose stock recently reached nearly $400 following a robust earnings report, outperforming both the S&P 500 and Nvidia this year. Investors in Micron remain cautious as the market competition intensifies, driven by the growing demand for advanced memory solutions powered by AI.

data.title: Ethereum Foundation Launches Post-Quantum Computing Team to Bolster Security
data.description: The Ethereum Foundation has unveiled a new team focused on post-quantum computing to strengthen Ethereum's security against potential quantum threats. According to NS3.AI, this initiative includes a $1 million prize designed to stimulate progress in post-quantum cryptographic solutions. This strategic effort aims to protect Ethereum's blockchain as the quantum computing landscape evolves.

data.title: CleanSpark shares slide 10% as snowstorm risk, $45 million CEO pay disclosure spook investors
data.description:

data.title: CoreWeave Stock Jumps On $2Bn Investment By Nvidia
